thread_pool_entry(3) Library Functions Manual thread_pool_entry(3)

NAME

thread_pool_entry - Thread pool entry (internal linked list node).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/thread_pool.h>

Data Fields


asciichat_thread_t thread
Thread handle. int stop_id
Cleanup order (lower = stop first, -1 = unordered). void *(* thread_func )(void *)
Thread function. void * thread_arg
Thread argument. char name [64]
Thread name for debugging. struct thread_pool_entry * next
Linked list next pointer.

Detailed Description

Thread pool entry (internal linked list node).

Tracks individual threads in the pool. Threads are maintained in a sorted linked list by stop_id for ordered cleanup.

Definition at line 99 of file thread_pool.h.
